short_summary: US-Iran deal holds; gang leader killed
rationale: The confirmed US-Iran ceasefire and Hormuz reopening remains the dominant story for US residents through oil prices and markets; the Tren de Aragua strike is a continuation of last cycle's confirmed action.

top_events.title: US, Iran confirm ceasefire; Strait of Hormuz reopening, markets soar, oil falls
top_events.summary: Stock markets soaring and oil prices falling directly benefit US consumers and investors; the confirmed deal is a continuation of last cycle's major development with no new qualitative change.

top_events.title: US kills leader of Venezuela's Tren de Aragua gang in air strike, Trump says
top_events.summary: Trump confirms a US air strike killed the Tren de Aragua gang leader — this is a continuation of the confirmed action from last cycle; no new qualitative development.

top_events.title: China arrests US academic at conference for 'espionage activities'
top_events.summary: China has detained a US academic on espionage charges — a continuation of the US-China tensions pattern; no new qualitative escalation beyond the established baseline.
